message: 🌱 Add kcp: feat: add a workspace tree subcommand mission (#663)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kcp-1838-feat-add-a-workspace-tree-subcommand",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kcp: feat: add a workspace tree subcommand",
+    "description": "feat: add a workspace tree subcommand. Requested by 3+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kcp deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kcp version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kcp -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kcp\nhelm list -n kcp 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kcp installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kcp configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kcp configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kcp -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kcp\nkubectl get configmap -n kcp -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kcp\n```\n### Feature Description\n\nIt would be nice to have a workspace tree subcommand to visualize the hierarchy of workspaces, i.e."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for feat: add a workspace tree subcommand",
+        "description": "## Summary\n\nWorkspaces being nested objects its quite hard to keep mental image of the system in your head. \nSimple command to show workspace tree. Added -f to show full paths too so it is easier to use with `workspace use full_path`\n```\n[mjudeikis kcp]$ go run ./cmd/kubectl-workspaces/ tree -f    \n```yaml\nNAME           TYPE           PHASE   URL\n------------- ------------- -------- -----\nroot           universal      Ready   ...\n ├─ org1       organization   Ready   ...\n │   ├─ team1  organization   Ready   ...\n │   └─ team2  organization   Ready   ...\n └─ foo        user           Ready   ...\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kcp -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kcp\nkubectl get events -n kcp --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"feat: add a workspace tree subcommand\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Summary\n\nWorkspaces being nested objects its quite hard to keep mental image of the system in your head. \nSimple command to show workspace tree.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "NAME           TYPE           PHASE   URL\n------------- ------------- -------- -----\nroot           universal      Ready   ...\n ├─ org1       organization   Ready   ...\n │   ├─ team1  organization   Ready   ...\n │   └─ team2  organization   Ready   ...\n └─ foo        user           Ready   ..."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
